title: Sen. McConnell says fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence
summary: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed for the first time that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.

title: Live-action 'Moana' crashes to shore with underwhelming splash at the box office
summary: The Walt Disney Company’s live action “Moana” may be the No. 1 movie at the domestic box office, but it did not make a big splash in its first weekend in theaters.

title: Pasco deputies investigate shooting in Beacon Square neighborhood: PSO
summary: Multiple gunshots reported in a Beacon Square neighborhood led deputies to detain several people after investigators said weapons were fired in a backyard.
